description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with palm trees and a large central tree. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, flat roofs, and a spacious open-plan layout with a central swimming pool visible from multiple rooms. The front includes a driveway with a carport and a set of steps leading to the main entrance, flanked by greenery. The rear and side facades are characterized by expansive glass panels and sliding doors, providing seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The property is finished in a combination of white and gray tones, with wooden accents on the deck and interior floors. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large glass windows, flat roofs, a central pool, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a carport and open-plan living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, steps, and landscaped entry with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, boundary wall, and extensive glass windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central pool, large glass doors, and a prominent tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the carport, side windows, and the open backyard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped floor-to-ceiling windows
